title: JavaScript Crash Course: Full Beginner Tutorial
summary: NeuralNine presents a full beginner crash course on JavaScript covering syntax, data types, control flow, functions, arrays, classes, and HTML integration. The tutorial spans fundamentals from variables through object-oriented programming in a structured format.
